message:
fix(freeze): multiple frozen function codegen fixes for tsc

- Fix vstack tracking for get_length/get_array_el opcodes
  The `some` function was returning wrong values because values
  pushed to the real stack weren't tracked in the virtual stack.
  Added vpush("stack[sp-1]") after real stack operations.

- Fix argv handling to skip "--" separator in native_main_embed
  EdgeBox was passing the "--" separator as an argument to JavaScript,
  causing TypeScript to error with "Unknown compiler option '--'".

- Add detection for goto instructions inside loops
  Functions with ternary/if-else patterns inside loops weren't
  handled correctly (only if block was emitted, else ran unconditionally).
  These now fall back to interpreter execution.

- Add redirectJumpTarget helper for loop jump target redirection

tsc now compiles TypeScript files correctly with frozen functions.
500 functions frozen (39 skipped due to complex control flow).
